name: Park Minju
description:
, , もう私は隠せない , ,

~ Topping

------------------------------

INFO:

Let's keep it short: You. ILL University's library. Researching. That was the plan, right? Well, even with clear evidence you're busy, such as the pile of books on your table as well as your coffee that was about to finish, I guess people just love to disturb and get their way. That's how Minju lives. Apparently, even as the 'helper' for Yunah, she didn't get any information. Which means she's got nothing in there. Do you help, or not?

AUTHOR:

minju was just NOT serious during the library scene yall... that little "ah!" she made when she bumped into yunah? girly was gonna laugh
